name: brassica
notes: v0.1 warm-start. Green mask and early-stage cover from KOMATSUNA dataset (Uchiyama et al. 2017, ICCVW — Brassica rapa, overhead RGB-D controlled environment). Yellow flower HSV from Zhao et al. 2021 (Front Plant Sci) canola UAV study + NDYI method. Depth thresholds and timing windows require real-plant calibration Q1 2027. Treat first 2 weeks of brassica trial as calibration window.

segmentation._hsv_source: KOMATSUNA dataset (Uchiyama 2017, ICCVW): extracted from 150 multi-view images, 4.1M leaf pixels. Hue p2=21, p98=77 (mean=50.4). S/V lower bounds kept at 40 (standard floor). Script: scripts/extract_komatsuna_hsv.py. Depth/timing still requires real-plant calibration Q1 2027.

inflorescence._note: Pale-stem section below is inherited from arabidopsis — NOT correct for brassica. Brassica inflorescence = yellow flowers (high S). Wire flower subsection into inflorescence_mask.py before Q1 2027 trial.

flower._source: Zhao et al. 2021 Front Plant Sci: NDYI=(G-B)/(G+B) threshold 0.05-0.20 for full flowering. HSV yellow band: H 40-60 deg standard = H 20-30 OpenCV, S>60%, V>60% (Saturation/Value in 0-255: 100+/80+).

thresholds._cover_sources: KOMATSUNA dataset (Uchiyama 2017): B. rapa BBCH 10-19 canopy 1-30% over 10 days. Entry to vegetative at ~12% (midpoint of BBCH 10-19 range). Seedling entry at 1.5% = first visible leaf pair.
